items.name: block-1
items.description: A block with a test module, product-test link, and API route.
items.docs:
## Test Block Configuration

Add the test module to your `medusa-config.ts`:

```ts
modules: [
  {
    resolve: './modules/test',
    options: {
      apiKey: process.env.TEST_API_KEY,
    },
  },
]
```

## Environment Variables

Add the following to your `.env` file:

```
TEST_API_KEY=your-api-key
```

items.name: seller-impersonate
items.description: Allows admin to impersonate a seller and open the vendor portal on their behalf. Adds a POST /admin/sellers/:id/impersonate endpoint and an impersonation section on the seller detail page.
items.docs:
## Seller Impersonate

This block adds seller impersonation to the admin panel.

## Usage

Navigate to a seller detail page in the admin panel and click **Login as seller**. A vendor session will be created and the vendor portal will open in a new tab.

## Environment Variables

Add the following to `apps/admin/.env` so the admin knows where the vendor portal lives:

```
VENDOR_URL=http://localhost:7001
```

Also add `__VENDOR_URL__` to `apps/admin/vite.config.ts`:

```ts
define: {
  __VENDOR_URL__: JSON.stringify(process.env.VENDOR_URL || 'http://localhost:7001'),
}
```
